zh.lifeSummary: 當Iain Sprangach MacDonald 1st. Clan Chief of Ardnamurchan於1275年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯萊時，他的父親Angus "Aonghus Mor Engull" MacDonald of the Isles26歲，母親Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe23歲。他於大約1295年與Nicleod MacLeod在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1342年在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾阿爾德納姆昌享年67歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Iain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Iain Sprangach MacDonald 1st. Clan Chief of Ardnamurchan was born in 1275, in Islay, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Angus "Aonghus Mor Engull" MacDonald of the Isles, was 26 and his mother, Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe, was 23. He married Nicleod MacLeod about 1295, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1342, in Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Iain Sprangach MacDonald 1st. Clan Chief of Ardnamurchan est né en 1275, à Islay, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Angus "Aonghus Mor Engull" MacDonald of the Isles, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Nicleod MacLeod environ 1295, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1342, à Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Iain Sprangach MacDonald 1st. Clan Chief of Ardnamurchan 1275 in Islay, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Angus "Aonghus Mor Engull" MacDonald of the Isles 26 und seine Mutter Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe 23. Er hat um 1295 in Scotland Nicleod MacLeod geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1342 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Iain Sprangach MacDonald 1st. Clan Chief of Ardnamurchan è nato il nel 1275 nel Islay, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Angus "Aonghus Mor Engull" MacDonald of the Isles, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Nicleod MacLeod circa 1295, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1342, nel Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

Clan Chief of Ardnamurchanが1275年にスコットランドアルグイルイスレイで生まれた時，父Angus "Aonghus Mor Engull" MacDonald of the Islesは26歳，母Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochaweは23歳であった。約1295年にスコットランドでNicleod MacLeodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1342年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルアルドナムルチャンで67歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Iain Sprangach MacDonald 1st. Clan Chief of Ardnamurchan(이)가 1275년 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬레이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Angus "Aonghus Mor Engull" MacDonald of the Isles(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1295년 스컷랜드에서 Nicleod MacLeod(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1342년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 아드남르챈에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Iain Sprangach MacDonald 1st. Clan Chief of Ardnamurchan nasceu em 1275, em Islay, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Angus "Aonghus Mor Engull" MacDonald of the Isles, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Nicleod MacLeod aproximadamente 1295, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1342, em Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Iain Sprangach MacDonald 1st. Clan Chief of Ardnamurchan родился в 1275 г. в местности ислеи, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Angus "Aonghus Mor Engull" MacDonald of the Isles было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Nicleod MacLeod около 1295 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1342 г. в местности арднамурчань, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Iain Sprangach MacDonald 1st. Clan Chief of Ardnamurchan nació en 1275, en Islay, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Angus "Aonghus Mor Engull" MacDonald of the Isles, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Nicleod MacLeod aproximadamente 1295, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1342, en Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
